device_info_locked.title: Lock Device Info setting (user cannot change)

memory_enabled.title: Enable Memory collection (total and available RAM)

storage_enabled.title: Enable Storage collection (drive type and capacity)

managed_attributes_enabled.title: Enable Managed Attributes collection (serial, asset ID, hostname, location)

device_name_format.title: Device name format template for reports (e.g. {serial} -- {location})
device_name_format.description: Supported variables: {serial}, {asset_id}, {location}, {hostname}, {manufacturer}, {model}. Separators around empty variables are stripped automatically.

device_name_format_locked.title: Lock device name format (user cannot change)
